abstract: An atom that contains general information about a hot spot.
overview:
## Overview

The hot spot information atom contains general information about a hot spot. Its atom type is `kQTVRHotSpotInfoAtomType` (`'hsin'`). Every hot spot atom should have a hot spot information atom as a child.

The structure of a hot spot information atom is defined by the `QTVRHotSpotInfoAtom` data type:

items.description: The major version number of the file format.
items.name: majorVersion

items.description: The minor version number of the file format.
items.name: minorVersion

items.description: The ID of the string atom that contains the name of the hot spot.
items.name: nameAtomID

items.description: The ID of the string atom that contains a comment for the hot spot.
items.name: commentAtomID

items.description: An array of three IDs for custom hot spot cursors.
items.name: cursorID

items.description: The best pan angle for viewing this hot spot.
items.name: bestPan

items.description: The best tilt angle for viewing this hot spot.
items.name: bestTilt

items.description: The best field of view for viewing this hot spot.
items.name: bestFOV

items.description: The best view center for viewing this hot spot.
items.name: bestViewCenter

items.description: The boundary box for this hot spot, specified as the number of pixels in full panoramic space.
items.name: hotSpotRect

items.description: A set of hot spot flags.
items.name: flags

items.description: An atom that describes the type and ID of a node, as well as other information about the node.
items.name: Node header atom ('ndhd')

items.description: An atom that is the parent for all hot spot atoms for the node.
items.name: Hot spot parent atom ('hspa')

items.description: An atom that identified the hot spot type.
items.name: Specific information atom

items.description: An atom that specifies information for a link hot spot.
items.name: Link hot spot atom ('link')

title: Hot spot information atom ('hsin')
